#  Manually Create Divisions 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)[Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click **+Create Division**.
  3. Enter a number for the division.  
_Note:_ You cannot specify a number that is currently associated with another division.
  4. Enter a description for the division.
  5. Click **Create**.


## See Also
  * [Specifications - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * [Manually Create Specification Sections](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/manually-create-spec-sections)
  * [What if my specification sections or divisions start in the middle of a page?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-if-my-spec-sections-or-divisions-start-in-the-middle-of-a-page)
title: Manually Create Divisions
description: How to create a new division in the Specifications tool.
